items.title: MFA is not enabled for Root Account
items.desc: Ensure Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is enabled for the AWS root account.

items.title: MFA is not enabled for IAM Users
items.desc: Ensure Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is enabled for all AWS IAM users with AWS Console access.

items.title: Multiple Access Keys exists for IAM Users
items.desc: Detects when a canary token access key has been used

items.title: Cross-Account Access Lacks External ID and MFA
items.desc: Ensure cross-account IAM roles use either MFA or external IDs to secure the access to AWS resources.

items.title: Lack of Access Key Rotation
items.desc: Ensure AWS IAM access keys are rotated on a periodic basis as a security best practice (90 Days).

items.title: Password Expiration is Disabled
items.desc: Ensure AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) user passwords are reset before expiration (90 Days).

items.title: Weak Password Policy ( AWS Default password policy) is set for the AWS account
items.desc: Ensure AWS account has an IAM strong password policy in use

items.title: Weak IAM Server Certificate in use
items.desc: Ensure that all your SSL/TLS certificates are using either 2048 or 4096 bit RSA keys instead of 1024-bit keys.

items.title: IAM Role Policy are Too Permissive
items.desc: Ensure AWS IAM policies attached to IAM roles are not too permissive.

items.title: IAM Access Analyzer is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure that IAM Access Analyzer feature is enabled to maintain access security to your AWS resources.

items.title: Pre-Heartbleed Server Certificates
items.desc: Ensure that your server certificates are not vulnerable to Heartbleed security bug.

items.title: Root Account Access Keys Present
items.desc: Ensure that your AWS account (root) is not using access keys as a security best practice.

items.title: Lack of SSH Public Keys Rotation
items.desc: Ensure IAM SSH public keys are rotated on a periodic basis to adhere to AWS security best practices.

items.title: SSL/TLS Certificate is about to Expire
items.desc: Ensure SSL/TLS certificates are renewed before their expiration.

items.title: Security Challenge Question not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure security challenge questions are enabled and configured to improve the security of your AWS account.

items.title: Security Contact Information is not Registered
items.desc: Ensure alternate contacts are set to improve the security of your AWS account.

items.title: AWS Multi-Account are managed centrally via Identity Federation or AWS Organization
items.desc: Set up, organize and manage your AWS accounts for optimal security and manageability.

items.title: Root Account Recently used
items.desc: Ensure root account credentials have not been used recently to access your AWS account.

sections.title: Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2) , Elastic Blob Storage (EBS), Elastic Load Balancer V2 (ELBv2)

items.title: Overbroad Ingress Rules for Security Groups
items.desc: Ensure no EC2 security group allows unrestricted inbound access to any uncommon ports.

items.title: EC2 Instance Termination Protection is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure Termination Protection feature is enabled for EC2 instances that are not part of ASGs.

items.title: AMIs are Publicaly Shared
items.desc: Ensure your Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) are not accessible to all AWS accounts.

items.title: Golden/Approved AMIs not in Use
items.desc: Ensure all AWS EC2 instances are launched from approved AMIs.

items.title: Amazon EBS Snapshots are Publicly Accessible
items.desc: Ensure that your Amazon EBS volume snapshots are not accessible to all AWS accounts.

items.title: Amazon EBS Volumes Encryption is not enabled
items.desc: Ensure that existing Elastic Block Store (EBS) attached volumes are encrypted to meet security and compliance requirements.

items.title: Amazon EBS Snapshots Encryption is not enabled
items.desc: Ensure Amazon EBS snapshots are encrypted to meet security and compliance requirements.

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for EBS Volume Encryption
items.desc: Ensure EBS volumes are encrypted with KMS CMKs in order to have full control over data encryption and decryption.

items.title: Weak Cryptographic Controls for ELB
items.desc: Ensure AWS Application Load Balancers (ALBs) are using the latest predefined security policy.

items.title: Load Balancer is not Integrated with AWS WAF
items.desc: Ensure that WAF ACL is integrated with Elastic Load Balancer

items.title: ELB uses In-secure protocols
items.desc: Ensure that your Application Load Balancer (ALB) listeners are using a secure protocol such as HTTPS.

items.title: ELB Deletion Protection Disabled
items.desc: Ensure Deletion Protection feature is enabled for your AWS load balancers to follow security best practices.

items.title: Access logging disabled for ELB
items.desc: Ensure access logging is enabled for your AWS ALBs to follow security best practices.

items.title: VPC Flow Logs Disabled
items.desc: Ensure Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) Flow Logs feature is enabled in all applicable AWS regions.

items.title: Overbroad S3 Access Control
items.desc: Ensure that your AWS S3 buckets are not publicly exposed to the Internet.

items.title: Cross-Account Access for S3 Buckets
items.desc: Ensure Amazon S3 buckets do not allow unknown cross account access via bucket policies.

items.title: Server-Side Encryption is not Enabled for S3
items.desc: Ensure AWS S3 buckets enforce Server-Side Encryption (SSE)

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for S3 Buckets Encryption
items.desc: Ensure that Amazon S3 buckets are encrypted with customer-provided AWS KMS CMKs

items.title: Versioning and Multi-Factor Delete is not Enabled on S3 buckets
items.desc: Ensure AWS S3 buckets have the MFA Delete feature enabled. Ensure AWS S3 object versioning is enabled for an additional level of data protection.

items.title: Access Logging Disabled for S3
items.desc: Ensure AWS S3 buckets have server access logging enabled to track access requests.

items.title: Secure Transport is Not Enabled on S3
items.desc: Ensure AWS S3 buckets enforce SSL to secure data in transit

items.title: CloudTrail Log Encryption Disabled
items.desc: Ensure your AWS CloudTrail logs are encrypted using AWS KMS–Managed Keys (SSE-KMS).

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for CloudTrail Encryption
items.desc: Ensure that KMS master keys are used for CloudTrail Encryption

items.title: CloudTrail Log File Validation is Disabled
items.desc: Ensure your AWS CloudTrail trails have log file integrity validation enabled.

items.title: CloudTrail is not integrated with CloudWatch
items.desc: Ensure CloudTrail event monitoring with CloudWatch is enabled.

items.title: No Security Incident Alarm exist for AWS Services
items.desc: Ensure that Security Incident Alarms are created in CloudWatch

items.title: RDS Database instance are Publicly accessible
items.desc: Ensure RDS database instances are not publicly accessible and prone to security risks.

items.title: Deletion protection is not Enabled for RDS Instance
items.desc: Ensure Deletion Protection feature is enabled for your AWS RDS database instances.

items.title: RDS Automated Backup is not enabled
items.desc: Ensure that Automated Backups are created for the RDS Instances

items.title: RDS Instance Encryption is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure AWS RDS instances are encrypted to meet security and compliance requirements.

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for RDS Instance Encryption
items.desc: Ensure RDS instances are encrypted with KMS CMKs in order to have full control over data encryption and decryption.

items.title: RDS Snapshots Encryption is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure that AWS RDS snapshots are encrypted to meet security and compliance requirements.

items.title: RDS Snapshots Publicly accessible
items.desc: Ensure that your Amazon RDS database snapshots are not accessible to all AWS accounts.

items.title: RDS Log Exports is not Enabled (RDS MySQL, Aurora and MariaDB)
items.desc: Ensure Log Exports feature is enabled for your AWS RDS MySQL, Aurora and MariaDB database instances.

items.title: IAM Database Authentication is not Enabled for RDS Instances
items.desc: Ensure IAM Database Authentication feature is enabled for your AWS RDS MySQL and PostgreSQL database instances.

items.title: RDS Auto Minor Version Upgrade Not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure AWS RDS instances have the Auto Minor Version Upgrade feature enabled.

items.title: RDS Database Instance not updated
items.desc: Ensure that the RDS Instance is Updated

items.title: RDS Automated Backup is not enabled
items.desc: Ensure AWS RDS instances have Automated Backups feature enabled.

items.title: RDS Secure Transport is not Enabled (SQL Server, PostgreSQL)
items.desc: Ensure AWS RDS SQL Server instances have Transport Encryption feature enabled.

items.title: RDS Backup Retention Period is not enough
items.desc: Ensure AWS RDS instances have sufficient backup retention period for compliance purposes.

items.title: SSL/TLS Certificates Already Expired for RDS
items.desc: Ensure that RDS Instance is using the updated SSL Certificate

items.title: RDS not using Multi-AZ deployment
items.desc: Ensure AWS RDS clusters have the Multi-AZ feature enabled.

items.title: Cross-Account Access for SNS Topics
items.desc: Ensure Amazon SNS topics do not allow unknown cross account access.

items.title: SNS Topics Exposed to Everyone
items.desc: Ensure that AWS Simple Notification Service (SNS) topics are not exposed to everyone.

items.title: Server-Side Encryption is Not Enabled for AWS SNS Topics
items.desc: Ensure that Amazon SNS topics enforce Server-Side Encryption (SSE).

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for SNS Topics Encryption
items.desc: Ensure that Amazon SNS topics are encrypted with KMS Customer Master Keys (CMKs).

items.title: Lack of KMS Key Rotation
items.desc: Ensure KMS key rotation feature is enabled for all your Customer Master Keys (CMK).

items.title: AWS Keys Exposed to Everyone
items.desc: Ensure Amazon KMS master keys are not exposed to everyone.

items.title: Cross-Account Access for KMS Service
items.desc: Ensure Amazon KMS master keys do not allow unknown cross account access.

items.title: Code Signing is not Enabled for Lambda Functions
items.desc: Ensure that Code Signing is enabled for your Amazon Lambda functions.

items.title: Lambda Runtime Environment Version is not Latest
items.desc: Ensure that the latest version of the runtime environment is used for your AWS Lambda functions.

items.title: Cross-Account Access for Lambda Functions Queues
items.desc: Ensure AWS Lambda functions do not allow unknown cross account access via permission policies.

items.title: Lambda Function Exposed to Everyone
items.desc: Ensure that your Amazon Lambda functions are not exposed to everyone.

items.title: Lambda Environment Variables are not Encrypted
items.desc: Ensure encryption is enabled for the AWS Lambda environment variables that store sensitive information.

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for Lambda Environment Variables Encryption
items.desc: Ensure Lambda environment variables are encrypted with KMS Customer Master Keys (CMKs) to gain full control over data encryption and decryption.

items.title: AWS Config Not Used
items.desc: Ensure AWS Config is enabled in all regions to get the optimal visibility of the activity on your account.

items.title: Validate AWS Config Rules
items.desc: Validate the AWS Config Rules and check for NonCompliant Rules

items.title: AWS GuardDuty Not Used
items.desc: Ensure Amazon GuardDuty is enabled to help you protect your AWS accounts and workloads against security threats.

items.title: Validate the AWS GuardDuty Findings
items.desc: Always validate the findings that are reported by GuardDuty

items.title: Route 53 Domain Transfer Lock is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure your domain names have the Transfer Lock feature enabled in order to keep them secure.

items.title: SPF Record not Present
items.desc: Ensure there is an SPF record set for each MX DNS record in order to stop spammers from spoofing your domains.

items.title: Route53 Domains Already Expired
items.desc: Ensure expired AWS Route 53 domains names are restored.

items.title: Route53 Domains are about to Expire
items.desc: Ensure AWS Route 53 domain names are renewed before their expiration (90 days before expiration).

items.title: DNSSEC Signing for Route 53 Hosted Zones is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure that DNSSEC signing is enabled for your Amazon Route 53 Hosted Zones.

items.title: EKS Secret Encryption is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure that envelope encryption of Kubernetes secrets using Amazon KMS is enabled.

items.title: Kubernetes Cluster Logging is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure that EKS control plane logging is enabled for your Amazon EKS clusters.

items.title: Kubernetes Cluster Version is not Updated
items.desc: Ensure that the latest version of Kubernetes is installed on your Amazon EKS clusters.

items.title: Cluster Endpoints are Publicly accessible
items.desc: Ensure that AWS EKS cluster endpoint access is not public and prone to security risks.

items.title: Server-Side Encryption is not Enabled for SQS Queues
items.desc: Ensure Amazon SQS queues enforce Server-Side Encryption (SSE).

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for SQS Queue Encryption
items.desc: Ensure SQS queues are encrypted with KMS CMKs to gain full control over data encryption and decryption.

items.title: SQS Queue Exposed to Everyone
items.desc: Ensure that AWS Simple Queue Service (SQS) queues are not exposed to everyone.

items.title: Cross-Account Access for SQS Queues
items.desc: Ensure AWS Simple Queue Service (SQS) queues do not allow unknown cross account access.

items.title: Continuous Backup is Not Enabled for DynamoDB
items.desc: Ensure that continous backup is enabld for all the DynamoDB

items.title: KMS Customer Master Keys is not used for DynamoDB Table Encryption
items.desc: Ensure that for all the DynamoDB tables are using KMS Customers Master Keys for encryption

items.title: AWS Backup Vault is Not Prevented from Accidental Deletion
items.desc: Ensure that Accidental Deletion is enabled for AWS Backup Vault

items.title: Redshift Cluster is publicly accessible
items.desc: Ensure that Redshift Cluster is not publicly accessible

items.title: Workspaces Volume Encryption is not Enabled
items.desc: Ensure that the volume encryption is enabled for all the Workspaces

items.title: Older Version of ElastiCache Engine in Use
items.desc: Ensure that you are not using an older version of elasticache and use the latest version that is available

items.title: ElastiCache Redis cluster In-Transit and At-rest Encryption not enabled
items.desc: Ensure that redis clusters data In-transit and At-rest encryptions are enabled

items.title: Access logging disabled for CloudFront
items.desc: Ensure that access logging is enabled for Cloudfront

items.title: WAF is Not Enabled in CloudFront
items.desc: Ensure that WAF is enabled for all the available Cloudfront

items.title: TLSv1.0 Supported by CloudFront Distribution
items.desc: Ensure that you are using latest TLS version for all Cloudfront
